title: Cannot access the dashboard
description: Getting a 404 error when trying to load the main dashboard after login.

title: Payment failed but amount
description: I tried to upgrade my plan, the payment failed but money was deducted from my card.

title: How to change account email?
description: I need help changing the primary email address associated with my account.

title: Mobile app keeps crashing
description: The Android app crashes immediately after I tap on the 'Settings' icon.

title: Request for invoice copy
description: Please send me the invoice copy for the last month's subscription.

title: Unable to upload profile picture
description: Whenever I try to upload a JPEG file, it says 'format not supported'.

title: API rate limit exceeded too quickly
description: We are hitting the API rate limit even though we are sending fewer requests than allowed.

title: Feature request: Dark Mode
description: It would be great if you could add a dark mode toggle to the dashboard.

title: Account suspended by mistake
description: My account was suspended automatically. I believe this is a mistake.

title: Data export is taking too long
description: Trying to export my customer list to CSV, but it's stuck at 99%. as soon as I click

title: Wrong billing address on receipt
description: The receipt shows my old company address. Please update it. as soon as I click

title: Password reset link expired
description: The password reset email arrives, but the link says 'expired' as soon as I click it.

title: Two-factor authentication not
description: I am trying to log in but not receiving the 2FA SMS code on my phone.

title: Integration with Slack is failing
description: Cannot connect the Slack app to my workspace. It throws an OAuth error.

title: Typo in the welcoming email
description: There is a spelling mistake in the welcome email sent to new users.
